al function m(m)return f[m-(-858006-(-882081))]end for m,G in ipairs({{463342+-463341;151266-150276},{59407+-59406;-506364+507269};{-839873+840779,-753455-(-754445)}})do while G[199196-199195]<G[-797466+797468]do
